topStories.title: Dollar surges in Asia as war's safe-haven shelter
topStories.description: The US dollar is surging, becoming the strongest safe asset. War in the Middle East has sent oil prices soaring and other assets tumbling. This situation raises fears of a global recession. The dollar's strength is supported by its status as an energy exporter and rising US Treasury yields. Asian currencies are experiencing significant losses.

topStories.title: 'Promoting Desire As News': Iran's Ghalibaf Slams Trump's 'Negotiator' Claim
topStories.description: Tehran has already denied holding any "direct" talks with the United States, saying that it has received messages through some mediators regarding Trump's desire for negotiations.

topStories.title: Iran-US war: US reveals why they killed Iranian leaders, Leavitt says ‘lied to United States’
topStories.description: The U.S. adopts a tougher stance on Iran, viewing past negotiations as deceptive.

topStories.title: Trump Is Willing To End Iran War Even If Hormuz Remains Closed: Report
topStories.description: Trump reportedly assessed that a mission to pry open the chokepoint would push the conflict beyond his timeline of four to six weeks.

topStories.title: LeBron James records triple-double as Lakers dominate Wizards
topStories.description: Led by James's 125th regular-season triple-double, the LA Lakers destroyed the Washington Wizards for their 49th win.

topStories.title: Iran's Hormuz Grip Is Tighter Than Ever After A Month Of War
topStories.description: Iran declared its control of the chokepoint immediately after US and Israel began strikes at the end of February, warning that no American vessel was allowed to enter the Persian Gulf

topStories.title: Gold, silver prices rise 1% but analysts cautious after 15% March drop; here's why
topStories.description: Gold and silver prices rebounded in global markets after a sharp March sell-off, supported by a weaker dollar and easing bond yields. However, sentiment remains cautious as inflation risks, elevated energy prices, and fading expectations of US rate cuts continue to weigh on outlook and keep volatility elevated.

topStories.title: U.P. Opposition pushes social justice, secularism pitch through rallies, conferences
topStories.description: While the SP held a rally named ‘Samajwadi Samanta Bhaichara Rally’, in Dadri, Western U.P, March 29, the Congress is holding ‘Sadhbhavna Baithak’ (harmony meetings) and ‘Samvidhan Samvad’ (constitution conference) across the State

topStories.title: Spain closes airspace to US warplanes involved in war on Iran
topStories.description: Spain has taken another step in rejecting the US-Israeli war on Iran, denying US warplanes the use of its airspace.

topStories.description: Experts cast doubt on some of the claims made by US Secretary of State Marco Rubio in an interview with Al Jazeera.

dailyNews.description: Save on a tire inflator that's down to one of its lowest prices ever, a sports bra that's nearly 80% off and more through tomorrow, March 31.

dailyNews.description: Shedeur Sanders is switching to No. 2 with the Cleveland Browns, reclaiming his college number from Jackson State and Colorado for his sophomore NFL season.

dailyNews.description: Former Colorado Teacher of the Year finalist Tera Johnson-Swartz was sentenced to 14 years in prison for child sexual exploitation and cybercrime.

dailyNews.description: Illegal alien Xa Lee tried to strike an ICE officer with his car in Sacramento, California, during an arrest attempt, and the fugitive remains at large.

dailyNews.title: Detransitioner Chloe Cole accuses media of ‘trying to suppress’ coverage of transgender shooters

Plus. House intelligence committee member Democratic Rep. Jim Himes joins.

dailyNews.title: TSA workers start receiving paychecks after weeks of financial strain
dailyNews.description: TSA workers across the country are starting to receive about a month's worth of back pay after President Trump signed an executive order last week. Kris Van Cleave reports.

dailyNews.title: TSA Workers Begin to Receive Paychecks After Trump Signs Executive Order
dailyNews.description: A memo that President Trump signed on Friday ordering the Department of Homeland Security to pay T.S.A. officers did not specify whether they would be paid on a regular schedule.

dailyNews.title: Senators Seek Answers From Trump Administration About Airport Immigration Arrests
dailyNews.description: Airport security officials have been sharing passenger data with immigration agents, but the program received little attention until videos captured a woman and her daughter being detained at San Francisco’s airport.

dailyNews.title: Mexico Pressures U.S. Over Deaths of Its Citizens in ICE Custody
dailyNews.description: Claudia Sheinbaum, president of Mexico, said her country would take legal steps to demand better conditions at immigration detention facilities, where she said 14 Mexican citizens had died since President Trump took office.

dailyNews.title: After Months of Threats, Trump Softens His Stance on Blocking Oil to Cuba
dailyNews.description: The White House press secretary said the United States would evaluate oil shipments to Cuba on a “case-by-case basis,” after a Russian tanker full of crude reached the island.

dailyNews.title: DeSantis Signs Bill to Rename Florida Airport for Trump
dailyNews.description: The airport near West Palm Beach will be rebranded the President Donald J. Trump International Airport on July 1, if approved by the Federal Aviation Administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump Reveals New Look for White House Ballroom After Times Article
dailyNews.description: Architects and preservation organizations have warned that little scrutiny has been given to the project’s design plans.

dailyNews.title: ‘I Think That MAGA Is Dying:’ Inside the Youth Movement at CPAC
dailyNews.description: At a sparsely attended Conservative Political Action Conference, young Republicans were eager to start the post-Trump era.

dailyNews.title: States Plow Ahead With A.I. Regulation, Defying Trump
dailyNews.description: States ranging from California to Utah are taking steps to place guardrails on the technology even after the president ordered them to stop.

dailyNews.title: Oil sees choppy trading as traders parse Trump comments on Iran war
dailyNews.description: Oil prices fell on Tuesday as U.S. President Donald Trump reportedly expressed willingness to end the military hostilities against Iran even if the Strait of Hormuz remains largely shut.

dailyNews.title: Asia markets trade mixed as oil markets whipsaw on report that Trump is seeking Iran war exit
dailyNews.description: Asia-Pacific markets were mixed on Tuesday as investors assesed Mideast conflict and volatile crude oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Are there talks to end the Iran war? Depends on which side you ask
dailyNews.description: It has been more than a week since President Donald Trump announced the U.S. was in conversation with Iran. But Tehran denies negotiations are taking place .
